login.title: Login
login.subtitle: Welcome back. Please enter your credentials to access the platform.
login.error: Incorrect email or password. Please try again.
login.no_account: Don't have an account? Contact your center.

logout.title: Logout
logout.message: Are you sure you want to log out?

dashboard.title: Administration Panel
dashboard.subtitle: Global management of centers, workshops, and program evaluations.

Assignments.title: Assignments and Workshops
Assignments.subtitle: Manage the activities assigned to your center.

Evaluations.title: Tracking and Evaluation
Evaluations.subtitle: Review of the impact and results of the workshops.

Notifications.subtitle_user: Stay up to date with phase changes, request resolutions, and official communications.

empty.title: No pending alerts
empty.subtitle: When there are changes in your requests or key dates, they will appear here.

delete_dialog.title: Delete Alert
delete_dialog.message: Are you sure you want to delete this alert? This action cannot be undone.

Calendar.title: Iter Calendar
Calendar.subtitle: View all milestones, workshops, and deadlines on a comprehensive calendar.
Calendar.assignment_desc: Total period of the workshop at the center.
Calendar.session_desc: Specific day and time of the activity.

submitted.title: Thank you for your participation!
submitted.subtitle: Your opinion helps us improve the Enginy Program. Your responses have been recorded correctly.

header.title: Student Self-Consultation
header.subtitle: We want to know about your experience during the workshop. Sincerity and detail will help us a lot!

questions.punctuality: Have you been punctual in submitting tasks?
questions.respect: Have you respected the materials and facilities?
questions.interest: What interest have you shown in learning?
questions.autonomy: Have you felt autonomous in problem solving?

impact.title: Vocational Impact
impact.question: Has it helped you decide on your professional future?

options.si: Yes, it has cleared my mind.
options.no: No, I already had it clear or it's not for me.
options.considerant: I am considering it right now.

feedback.title: Open Feedback
feedback.improvements_label: What would you change or improve about the workshop?

Metadata.title: Iter Web
Metadata.description: Iter web application for learning management.

Profile.title: My Profile
Profile.subtitle: Manage your personal information and academy preferences.
